allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c start "" "E:\\网站\\pages\\services.html" && cmd.exe /c start "" "E:\\网站\\pages\\services\\ebsd-standard.html")
Bash(cd "E:/网站" && gh repo create kikuchi-lab --public --description "菊池实验室 Kikuchi Lab - EBSD抛光与分析服务平台" --source . --push)
Bash(cd "E:/网站" && find . -name "*.html" -o -name "*.js" | while read f; do sed -i 's/锐测科技/菊池实验室/g; s/RUICE TECH/KIKUCHI LAB/g; s/ruice-tech/kikuchi-lab/g' "$f"; done)
Bash(cd "E:/网站" && npm init -y --name kikuchi-lab 2>&1 | head -5)
